nasb.text: Now on the day that Moses had finished setting up the tabernacle, he anointed it and consecrated it with all its furnishings and the altar and all its utensils; he anointed them and consecrated them also.

esv.text: On the day when Moses had finished setting up the tabernacle and had anointed and consecrated it with all its furnishings and had anointed and consecrated the altar with all its utensils,

cnv.text: 摩西豎立了帳幕的那天，就用膏抹它，使它成聖；又把其中的一切器具、祭壇和祭壇的一切器具，都用膏抹了，使它們成聖；

ccb.text: 摩西支好圣幕后，便用膏油抹圣幕和其中的器具、祭坛和坛上的器具，使它们圣洁。
